about.title: About Celiac Safe
about.share_message: Check out this app for 100% gluten-free restaurants in Spain: {{url}}
about.mission_body: Celiac Safe helps people with coeliac disease and gluten sensitivity find restaurants in Spain that cook 100% gluten-free — with confidence and without guesswork.
about.verification_body: We list venues that self-declare as fully gluten-free or are certified by coeliac associations (e.g. FACE, AOECS). We review listings manually and refresh information regularly. Data is indicative only: always confirm with the restaurant before eating.
about.noncommercial_body: Celiac Safe is an independent, non-commercial project for the coeliac community. We do not sell personal data, there is no profile-based advertising, and restaurants are not charged to appear in the guide.
about.maker_body: A small team from the coeliac community in the EU, supported by people living gluten-free in Spain. Data updates and replies to suggestions are handled personally and manually.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.translation_notice: English translation — legal review by the data protection officer is in progress. The Spanish version is authoritative until final approval.

sections.title: Who is responsible
sections.body:
Data controller (Art. 4(7) GDPR): Stephan [Surname], natural person based in the European Union (Germany), as operator of the «Celiac Safe» project.

General contact: contact@celiacsafe.app

App users do not have accounts or registration. A separate staff login (email/password) exists only for internal curation via the web admin.

sections.title: Data protection officer (DPO)
sections.body:
For data protection matters you may contact our certified Data Protection Officer (DPO) pursuant to Art. 37 GDPR:

Stephan [Surname] — DPO for Celiac Safe
Email: privacidad@celiacsafe.app

The DPO advises the controller and can handle privacy enquiries from data subjects.

sections.title: What data we process
sections.body:
The app is designed to minimise personal data:

• Device location: only when you tap «My location» on the map to centre the map. No background tracking and no transmission to our servers.

• Favourites: stored only in local device storage (AsyncStorage). Not synced to the cloud.

• Interface language: preference stored locally on the device.

• Restaurant suggestions via the in-app form: if you submit voluntarily, the details you enter (e.g. venue name, city, address, website, optional name/email, notes) are sent encrypted to our database hosted by Supabase (EU region, Frankfurt) and stored for review.

• Restaurant suggestions, contact or bug reports by email: only if you voluntarily send an email from your mail client. We receive what you write.

• Restaurant listings shown in the app: public or third-party information; not your health data.

sections.title: Where data is stored and retention
sections.body:
On-device data (favourites, language): until you uninstall the app or clear app data in system settings.

Suggestions from the in-app form: stored in Supabase (EU, Frankfurt) for processing; deleted or anonymised per our internal retention policy unless the suggestion is adopted or law requires longer storage.

Emails you send us: processed in our mailbox for as long as needed to handle your request; then deleted or anonymised per our internal retention policy.

We do not operate cloud user profile databases for app users.

sections.title: Legal basis (Art. 6 GDPR)
sections.body:
• Use of the app, viewing content and local favourites: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in providing an informational tool for the coeliac community), subject to your right to object.

• Location on demand: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent when granting system permission and tapping the button).

• Processing emails you send: Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent when sending) and, where applicable, (b) pre-contractual steps or (f) legitimate interest in maintaining the directory.

sections.title: Third-party providers
sections.body:
Certain features may involve independent providers under their own terms:

• Supabase (database hosting, EU Frankfurt): stores restaurant suggestions from the in-app form and restaurant data for the app. Privacy: https://supabase.com/privacy

• Embedded maps (react-native-maps): Apple Maps on iOS and Google Maps on Android typically. Showing the map or opening directions may communicate coordinates to those providers. See their privacy policies.

• External links: phone, WhatsApp, websites, Instagram, Facebook or other apps you open voluntarily.

• System mail client: when you send suggestions or contact us by email, you send from your email provider (e.g. Gmail, iCloud Mail).

• App stores (Apple App Store, Google Play): if you rate or share the app, Apple or Google terms apply.

We do not sell personal data or run profile-based advertising.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body:
You may request access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and portability where the GDPR provides.

For data stored only on your device, you can exercise these by clearing app data or uninstalling.

For emails you sent us, contact privacidad@celiacsafe.app or contact@celiacsafe.app. We respond within statutory time limits (usually one month, extendable under Art. 12 GDPR).

sections.title: Complaints to a supervisory authority
sections.body:
If you believe processing infringes the GDPR, you may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority, e.g.:

• Spain: Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD), www.aepd.es

• Germany: the supervisory authority of your federal state (e.g. BayLDA, LfDI, etc.)

We encourage you to contact us first at privacidad@celiacsafe.app.

sections.title: Changes to this policy
sections.body: We may update this policy when app features or legal requirements change. The date appears at the top. The current version will also be published as a URL for app stores (planned in a later project phase).

impressum.title: Legal notice

sections.title: Responsible person
sections.body:
Stephan [Surname]
Operator of the «Celiac Safe» project (mobile app with indicative information on gluten-free venues).

sections.title: Postal address
sections.body:
Natural person based in Germany (European Union).
Full postal address available on reasonable request at contact@celiacsafe.app (Sec. 5 TMG / Art. 13 GDPR).

Replace [Surname] and address wording with your final details before store publication.

sections.title: Electronic contact
sections.body:
Email: contact@celiacsafe.app
Restaurant suggestions: submissions@celiacsafe.app
Data protection: privacidad@celiacsafe.app

sections.title: Content responsibility (Sec. 55 (2) RStV)
sections.body:
Stephan [Surname]
(same person and contact as above; postal address on request).

sections.title: Disclaimer
sections.body:
Content is prepared with care. We do not warrant accuracy, completeness or timeliness of venue information (hours, menus, certifications). Information is indicative only.

The app does not replace medical advice or direct confirmation with each restaurant before eating.

External links: we do not control third-party content; the respective page provider is responsible.

Third-party trademarks belong to their owners.

sections.title: Nature of the project
sections.body: Celiac Safe is a non-commercial, independent project for the coeliac community. It does not constitute medical advice or a contractual relationship with listed venues unless expressly stated otherwise.

impressum.dsb_notice: For data protection matters, contact our DPO directly at privacidad@celiacsafe.app.

admin.login_hint: Internal curator tool. PIN for admin devices only.
admin.dashboard_intro: Manage restaurants, review suggestions, import/export CSV for the Excel pipeline.
admin.offline_note: Changes are local on this device. For release: export CSV → Excel → npm run data:build.
admin.hide_message: The restaurant will no longer appear in search or map.
admin.csv_format_restaurants: Restaurants: id, name, region_code, region_name, city, latitude, longitude, …

submit.title: Suggest a restaurant
submit.hint: Your suggestion is saved and reviewed personally before the restaurant is added.
submit.error_generic: The suggestion could not be sent. Please try again later.
submit.success_message: Your mail app opened. Send the message to complete your suggestion.
submit.success_message_supabase: Your suggestion was saved and will be reviewed. Thank you!
submit.rate_limit_email: Several suggestions were already sent from this email address. Please try again tomorrow or contact us directly.
submit.rate_limit_global: Many suggestions are being submitted right now. Please try again in an hour.
submit.rate_limit_duplicate: This restaurant was suggested recently. We are already reviewing that entry.
submit.rate_limit_client: Please wait a few minutes before submitting another suggestion.
submit.validation_website: Must start with http, https or www
submit.mail_error: Could not open the mail client

disclaimer.short: Indicative information only. Always confirm with the restaurant.
disclaimer.full: This app provides indicative information about restaurants that self-declare as 100% gluten-free or are certified by coeliac associations. The app operators do not guarantee the accuracy, timeliness or food safety of each establishment. We recommend always confirming with the restaurant before eating.
